original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement
original_registry_entry.population: Adults with pituitary incidentalomas, with symptom, lesion, endocrine, pregnancy, visual, and surgical qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Pituitary incidentaloma clinical evaluation, endocrine testing, imaging, visual assessment, consultation, and follow-up.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Partial for a broad pituitary-symptoms workflow. Exact only for selected headache, visual, endocrine-symptom, hormone-profile, imaging, visual-field, and referral documentation; diagnosis, hormone replacement, treatment, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_sections.heading: Diagnosis and clinical evaluation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports headache, visual loss or blurring, diplopia, cranial-neuropathy, fatigue, and altered-mental-status context as clinician-recorded symptoms or prompts.

exact_sections.heading: Consultation recommendations
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports endocrinology or neurosurgery consultation documentation in qualified severe-headache, visual-deficit, hormone-symptom, lesion, or pregnancy contexts.

exact_sections.heading: Pituitary hormone evaluation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports pituitary hormone-profile review and relevant reproductive or prolactin symptom context without inferring hormone deficiency or excess.

exact_sections.heading: Imaging and visual assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports pituitary imaging review, visual fields, and visual-acuity documentation in recommendation-qualified contexts.

title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement
population: Adults with pituitary incidentalomas, with symptom, lesion, endocrine, pregnancy, visual, and surgical qualifiers.
intended_setting: Pituitary incidentaloma clinical evaluation, endocrine testing, imaging, visual assessment, consultation, and follow-up.
access_limitations: Official host returned a challenge or shell page rather than guideline content.
